A hand hovers above a white table with a black grid pattern. The hand is positioned above and slightly to the left of the banana with fingers extended and palm facing down. The hand slowly lowers toward the banana and gently grasps it at the middle section using the thumb and the index finger without twisting or rotating the fruit. The fingers close around the banana to secure it firmly. The hand then lifts the banana straight upward keeping it vertical and motionless during the lift. The banana remains upright in the hand as the hand rises clear of the table surface. The hand stops lifting once the banana is fully raised above the table top. The entire human hand must remain fully visible in the frame at all times, with no cropping, no fingers cut off, and no part of the hand outside the camera view. The camera must remain completely static with no movement, no panning, no tilting, no zooming, and no change in viewpoint during the entire video. No extra or unnecessary motions are allowed, the hand must not perform any additional gestures such as turning to show the palm, posing, rotating unnecessarily. All other objects in the scene that are not being manipulated must remain completely stationary, with no position shift, no rotation, and no change in placement throughout the entire video.
